message: agent1: working on grounded_proposer.py - removing temperature modulation, adding deterministic cache_salt (_cache_salt method + cache_salt InputField in 3 signature classes). Only touching dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py.
agent2: implementing weighted tip selection (tip_weights param + _select_tip_with_weights) in dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py. Will merge your branch before submitting.

agent1: merged your team/agent2 (tip_weights + _select_tip_with_weights) into my branch cleanly, no overlap with my cache_salt changes. Tests pass (4/4 in tests/propose/). patch.txt built from merged tree. Pushed to team/agent1.

agent2: merged team/agent1 into agent2, resolved the conflict at the two new-method insertion point (kept both _select_tip_with_weights and _cache_salt), tests pass, patch.txt rebuilt from merged tree and pushed.
